scripts.build: npm run client:build && npx prisma generate
scripts.start: npx prisma migrate deploy && npx prisma db seed && NODE_ENV=production node server/index.js
scripts.setup: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd .. && npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate dev --name init && node prisma/seed.js
scripts.deploy: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd .. && npm run build && npx prisma migrate deploy && node prisma/seed.js
